member.name: T:PositionTape.Mismatch
member.summary: Describes the first 1-indexed position where two texts differ.
member.param: The 1-indexed mismatch position.
The expected character, or null when the expected text ended first.
The received character, or null when the received text ended first.

member.name: M:PositionTape.Mismatch.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Char},System.Nullable{System.Char})
member.summary: Describes the first 1-indexed position where two texts differ.
member.param: The 1-indexed mismatch position.
The expected character, or null when the expected text ended first.
The received character, or null when the received text ended first.

member.name: P:PositionTape.Mismatch.Position
member.summary: The 1-indexed mismatch position.

member.name: P:PositionTape.Mismatch.Expected
member.summary: The expected character, or null when the expected text ended first.

member.name: P:PositionTape.Mismatch.Received
member.summary: The received character, or null when the received text ended first.

member.name: T:PositionTape.ValidationResult
member.summary: Summarizes validation of received text against an expected PositionTape length.
member.param: True when received text exactly equals the expected generated tape.
The requested expected tape length.
The received text length.
The 1-indexed missing position when the received text is a valid truncated prefix.
The first mismatch, including length-only mismatches.

member.name: M:PositionTape.ValidationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},PositionTape.Mismatch)
member.summary: Summarizes validation of received text against an expected PositionTape length.
member.param: True when received text exactly equals the expected generated tape.
The requested expected tape length.
The received text length.
The 1-indexed missing position when the received text is a valid truncated prefix.
The first mismatch, including length-only mismatches.

member.name: P:PositionTape.ValidationResult.IsValid
member.summary: True when received text exactly equals the expected generated tape.

member.name: P:PositionTape.ValidationResult.ExpectedLength
member.summary: The requested expected tape length.

member.name: P:PositionTape.ValidationResult.ReceivedLength
member.summary: The received text length.

member.name: P:PositionTape.ValidationResult.TruncationPoint
member.summary: The 1-indexed missing position when the received text is a valid truncated prefix.

member.name: P:PositionTape.ValidationResult.FirstMismatch
member.summary: The first mismatch, including length-only mismatches.

member.name: T:PositionTape.PositionTape
member.summary: Reference implementation of the PositionTape diagnostic sequence.

member.name: F:PositionTape.PositionTape.DefaultSearchLength
member.summary: Default number of generated characters searched by locate and hash-window helpers.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.Generate(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates exactly characters of PositionTape.
member.param: The exact number of characters to generate.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.GenerateMarkerComplete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates tape extended only as needed to complete the marker crossing .
member.param: The requested boundary length.
member.returns: Generated tape with any boundary-crossing marker completed.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.Locate(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the first 1-indexed occurrence of a fragment in the default search window.
member.param: The fragment to locate.
member.returns: The 1-indexed position, or -1 when not found.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.Validate(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates received text against the exact tape for an expected length.
member.param: The text captured from a pipeline.
The expected exact tape length.
member.returns: Validation details including truncation and mismatch diagnostics.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.FindTruncationPoint(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the first 1-indexed position where received text stops matching the canonical tape prefix.
member.param: The captured text to inspect.
member.returns: The first mismatch position, or the next position after a valid prefix.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.FindFirstMismatch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Finds the first 1-indexed mismatch between expected and received text.
member.param: The expected text.
The received text.
member.returns: Mismatch details, or null when the texts are equal.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.BuildWindowIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds a SHA-256 hash index of fixed-size windows in the default search window.
member.param: The fixed fragment size to index.
member.returns: A map from lowercase SHA-256 hash to 1-indexed positions.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.LocateByHash(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Finds positions whose fixed-size window hash matches .
member.param: A lowercase or uppercase SHA-256 hex hash.
The fixed fragment size used to build the index.
member.returns: All matching 1-indexed positions in the default search window.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.HashFragment(System.String)
member.summary: Computes a lowercase SHA-256 hex hash for a tape fragment.
member.param: The fragment to hash as UTF-8.

member.name: M:PositionTape.PositionTape.GetMarkerCompleteLength(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the length needed to complete any marker crossing the requested boundary.
member.param: The requested boundary length.
member.returns: The exact requested length or the minimal marker-complete extension.
